name: AREthCreateConsumedServiceInstance
title: AREthCreateConsumedServiceInstance
syntax: dword AREthCreateConsumedServiceInstance( dword aepHandle, dword serviceId, dword instanceId );
description: This function creates a Consumed Service Instance and adds it to an Application Endpoint which was created by AREthOpenLocalApplicationEndpoint.
Objects can be assigned to the Service Instance as follows:
AREthReleaseConsumedServiceInstance can be used to delete the Service Instance again.
return: 0: An error occurred. The error can be evaluated using the AREthGetLastError function.
